title: Point Reyes Light — April 3, 1997 (Page 10)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated April 3, 1997, Page 10. This posthumous issue may contain coverage related to PKD's legacy, adaptations, or community items connected to his former residence in the Point Reyes area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, April 3, 1997, page 10. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This 1997 clipping falls during a period of intensifying scholarly and cultural interest in Dick's work. The Point Reyes Light continued to serve the western Marin County community where Dick had lived during the early 1960s. The specific relevance of this page to Dick studies remains to be determined through direct examination of the scanned image.
